reviews.review_description: i am unable to find the in -app purchases for this it says subscription but i am unable to find how to subscribe in-game

developer_response.body: We are glad you enjoy the application. The subscription is not an in-app purchase but instead works via the meta store. You seem to currently be on a 30-day free trial. Feel free to reach out to us at support@avrwell.com if you would like to learn more about our various purchase options and other applications.
